positive: A stunning, symmetrical cosmic kraken composed of geometric elements and bioluminescent flora. The design features intricate line work, glowing azure and deep violet colors contrasted against a matte black background. The kraken's tentacles morph into stylized celestial arcs, interwoven with abstract geometric patterns resembling crystal formations and nebula gas. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for a repeating or single-placement apparel print. Style is a blend of Neo-Art Nouveau, Cosmic Geometry, and clean Vector Illustration. Lighting is dramatic, emphasizing glowing edges and strong silhouette definition. Highly detailed, high contrast, clean lines, maximalist abstract art.
